LADEN BALLAST CONSUMPTION
KNOT (ABOUT) KNOT (ABOUT) MT (ABOUT)
12.5 13.0 25.5 (RMG380)
12 12.5 23.5 (RMG380)
IN PORT (WORKING): ABOUT 6.4 MT/DAY VLSFO (RMG380) + ABOUT 0.2MT/DAY LSMGO (DMA/SULPHUR CONTENT BELOW 0.1%);
IN PORT (IDLE): ABOUT 3.4 MT/DAY VLSFO (RMG380) + ABOUT 0.2MT/DAY LSMGO (DMA/SULPHUR CONTENT BELOW 0.1%).
VLSFO MEANS RMG380 CST BUT THE SULPHUR CONTENT BELOW 0.5%.
LSMGO MEANS DMA AND SULPHUR CONTENT BELOW 0.1%
+ALL DETAILS ABOUT+
"ABOUT" MEANS HAVING AN ALLOWANCE OF 0.5KNOT ON SPEED AND 5% ON BUNKERS OVER-CONSUMPTION, BOTH IN OWNERS FAVOR.
PLSD TO HEAR!
